name: stack-graph-workspace-renderer
description: The workspace portal renderer. Reuses a vendored bc-renderer-core (under vendor/) to render stack-graph's handbook + dashboard + graph-browser surfaces into a deployable static site. Install-free: all runtime deps (marked, marked-gfm-heading-id, js-yaml, github-slugger) are vendored from local trusted sources under vendor/ — no node_modules, matching the repo's dependency-free tooling philosophy.
